title: agentforce-action-reviewer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the agentforce-action-reviewer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run. At least one of `agent_id`, `agent_developer_name` must be provided.

agent_id.description: Example from AGENT.md: `Service_Agent_v2` Required column: 'yes'. One of a mutually-exclusive group: agent_id, agent_developer_name.

agent_developer_name.description: Example from AGENT.md: `Service_Agent_v2` Required column: 'yes'. One of a mutually-exclusive group: agent_id, agent_developer_name.
